title: CF_DocCentralV3_ArchiveDocument — Response Schema
description: Output returned to the Canvas App after the archiving run completes. The response always describes the full batch result — success is false if any document failed.

oneOf.title: Partial or full failure response
oneOf.description: One or more documents failed. success = false even if some succeeded.

failures.description: JSON-serialized array of failure entries. Canvas App parses with ParseJSON().

errorCodes.NO_DOCUMENTS_PROVIDED: Input documents array is empty — returned immediately without entering the loop.
errorCodes.DOC_NOT_FOUND: Svi predmeti item with given documentItemId does not exist.
errorCodes.INVALID_STATUS_FOR_ARCHIVE: Document Stanje is not Zavedeno. Message includes actual current status.
errorCodes.INVALID_ARCHIVE_SIGN: Archive sign value not found in App Config allowed list.
errorCodes.CONCURRENT_UPDATE: PATCH returned 412 and re-read confirmed item was modified to a non-Arhivirano state by another process.
errorCodes.ARCHIVE_UPDATE_FAILED: PATCH returned an unexpected non-2xx error.
errorCodes.ARCHIVE_DOCUMENT_FAILED: Unhandled exception escaped per-document scope — returned from Catch scope.

outputs.name: failures
outputs.note: JSON string — Canvas App uses ParseJSON() to read individual failure entries.

canvasAppGuidance.onSuccess: Show confirmation: 'Uspešno arhivirano {archivedCount} dokumenata.' Refresh the document list.
canvasAppGuidance.onPartialFailure: Show: '{archivedCount} dokumenata arhivirano. {failedCount} nije uspelo.' ParseJSON(failures) to display per-document error details.
canvasAppGuidance.onFullFailure: Show general error. If errorCode = NO_DOCUMENTS_PROVIDED, the selection was empty — prompt user to select documents.
canvasAppGuidance.idempotencyNote: If a document was already Arhivirano (e.g. archived by another user), the flow treats this as success (CONCURRENT_UPDATE 412 idempotency check). The Canvas App will not see it as a failure.

examples.failures: [{"documentItemId":43,"delovodniBroj":"6/2026","errorCode":"INVALID_STATUS_FOR_ARCHIVE","message":"Dokument nije u statusu Zavedeno. Trenutni status: U odobravanju"}]
